title: WokPack Voxy
description: WoKPack Voxy extends WoKPack with advanced LOD terrain rendering for dramatically increased render distance, improved far-detail quality, and stable performance.
body:
**WoKPack Voxy** is a high-performance client modpack built for large-scale building environments, extending the standard WoKPack experience with Voxy’s advanced level-of-detail terrain rendering.

It retains the full optimization stack, rendering improvements, and quality-of-life tooling of WoKPack, while replacing distant-horizon style rendering with a voxel-based LOD system designed to scale efficiently on massive worlds. This allows substantially increased effective render distance with improved far-terrain fidelity and more stable frame pacing compared to WoKPack DH, particularly in dense locations.

The pack is tuned for the scale and asset complexity of World of Keralis, where large builds, high entity counts, and heavy texture packs demand predictable client performance.

## Key Characteristics

- Maintains WoKPack’s full performance stack (Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, C2ME, ModernFix, and related optimizations)
- Integrates Voxy LOD terrain rendering for extreme long-range visibility
- Preserves shader compatibility, connected textures, and visual enhancements
- Fully compatible with WoKFlows resource packs and WoKPack QoL tooling
- Optimized for high-resolution creative building workflows in Minecraft
